title: Ringo's Terraria Alchemy
description: Cross mod that will transfer all potions, potion ingredients and effects 1 to 1 from the game Terraria. #Terraria Potions
body:
**Ringo's Terraria Alchemy** is a massive expansion that brings Terraria's iconic potions, materials, and crafting mechanics to Minecraft! You can support my project here [Boosty](https://boosty.to/ringoway)

## Key Features:

10 unique potions with effects from Terraria: from the classic "Iron Skin" to the exotic "Feathers".

7 magical plants for potions: Deadroot, Moonlight, Deathbloom and others.

New crafting systems: jars and special ingredients (pink gel, coral).

Realistic effects:
- Gills allow you to breathe underwater,
- Feather potion reduces gravity by 90%,
- Night Owl potion gives night vision like in Terraria,
- and much more.

"Potion Sickness" prevents abuse of healing.

Rare materials in chests: A bag of herbs can be found in dungeons, temples and pyramids.
 
![Creative Tab: Potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f647380188f50bb62278c6ec687be3e9c046ae7a.png)

## How to get started:

Place a Jar on a workbench - this is the basis for crafting potions.

Collect plants from different biomes or find bag of herbs in chest.
